name: PROMPTFLUX LLM-Proxy Fetch via GitHub Raw
description: Non-browser process fetching content from raw.githubusercontent.com — PROMPTFLUX LLM-proxy IOC
query: network where event.category == "network" and destination.domain == "raw.githubusercontent.com" and not process.name in ("msedge.exe", "chrome.exe", "firefox.exe", "iexplore.exe", "git.exe", "code.exe", "devenv.exe", "curl.exe", "wget.exe")

name: PROMPTFLUX wscript Staging From User-Writable Path
description: wscript.exe invoked with a .vbs argument by a parent process living in a user-writable data dir — PROMPTFLUX dropper staging
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.name : "wscript.exe" and process.command_line : "*.vbs*" and (process.parent.executable : "*\\Users\\Public\\*" or process.parent.executable : "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" or process.parent.executable : "*\\ProgramData\\*" or process.parent.executable regex~ "[C-Z]:\\\\[A-Z0-9]{1,4}\\\\.*")

name: PROMPTFLUX Thinging Staging Trail (thinking_robot_log.txt)
description: Creation of thinking_robot_log.txt file — exact GTIG-documented PROMPTFLUX IOC. Should never appear in a clean baseline.
query: file where event.action in ("creation", "rename", "modification") and file.name : "thinking_robot_log.txt"

name: PROMPTFLUX Metamorphic VBScript In-Place Rewrite
description: The same .vbs path written with different content hashes within 10 minutes — the Thinging module's hourly rewrite signal
query: sequence by file.path, process.entity_id with maxspan=10m [file where event.action in ("creation", "modification") and file.extension == "vbs"] [file where event.action == "modification" and file.extension == "vbs" and not file.hash.sha256 == null]

name: PROMPTFLUX Startup Folder VBS Drop
description: VBScript file written into a Windows Startup folder by a non-installer — PROMPTFLUX persistence primitive
query: file where event.action in ("creation", "rename") and file.extension == "vbs" and file.path : ("*Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\*", "*Start Menu\\Programs\\StartUp\\*") and not process.name in ("msiexec.exe", "setup.exe", "explorer.exe")

name: PROMPTFLUX Propagation Recon via wmic logicaldisk
description: wmic.exe logicaldisk enumeration spawned by a parent process in a user-writable data directory — PROMPTFLUX propagation recon
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.name : "wmic.exe" and process.command_line : "*logicaldisk*" and (process.parent.executable : "*\\Users\\Public\\*" or process.parent.executable : "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" or process.parent.executable : "*\\ProgramData\\*")
